testcase.name: test_order_creation_sets_status_and_invoice_lines

failure.message: AssertionError: cart_snapshot missing on order assert None + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x78d8ae119c40>('cart_snapshot') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x78d8ae119c40> = {'id': '6a5efcb4408255caee672c8a', 'user_id': '6a5e7b1c138542f3fbbbcc23', 'user_name': 'Budi Santoso', 'user_email': 'demo@client.com', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_sprint_extras.py:135: in test_order_creation_sets_status_and_invoice_lines assert order.get("cart_snapshot"), "cart_snapshot missing on order" E AssertionError: cart_snapshot missing on order E assert None E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x78d8ae119c40>('cart_snapshot') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x78d8ae119c40> = {'id': '6a5efcb4408255caee672c8a', 'user_id': '6a5e7b1c138542f3fbbbcc23', 'user_name': 'Budi Santoso', 'user_email': 'demo@client.com', ...}.get
